title: Retired Trader
description: This pack changes the texture of Nitwit.
body:
# Retired Trader *After a long, long journey, full of monsters, illagers, and players...
After thousands of potions bottles and buckets of milk...
After sands of desert and snows of mountains...
His coat became dirty, pale, and torn.
In some peaceful village Wandering Trader finally can rest.*
**Hi!** To the point: this pack changes texture of nitwit! You can see how Trader's journey came to the end.
**Hope you like it!**
